hypothesis: Given that GFN1-xTB systematically underestimates band gaps for MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) due to inadequate treatment of strong correlation effects, incorporating element-specific correction terms trained on a small set of high-fidelity DFT+U or hybrid functional calculations exclusively for transition metal-containing MOFs will enable a hierarchical Δ-learning framework that achieves sub-0.2 eV prediction accuracy across the full MOF chemical space without requiring expensive calculations for the entire dataset.
